description: A futuristically styled metal sphere container for hugo boss' boss in Motion, this versatile fragrance is perfect for cold winter nights and summer days, with excellent longevity. It opens with a citrusy aroma and has spicy base notes. Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
